ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the property, the text of which will be substituted for the link
ast.target: 属性的名称，其文本将被替换到链接中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you pass this text to the link as a name, then the placeholder will not be used and the name of the note will be displayed
ast.target: 如果您将此文本作为名称传递给链接，则不会使用占位符，而是显示笔记的名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text between the text between the placeholder and headers/block. You can specify it for links using a special header (at the end) like '!sep:SEP!', then the link [[MyNote#someHeader#!sep:SEP!]] will be displayed as 'MyNoteSEPsomeHeader'.
ast.target: 占位符与标题/块之间的文本。您可以使用特殊标题（在末尾）为链接指定它，例如 '!sep:SEP!'，那么链接 [[MyNote#someHeader#!sep:SEP!]] 将显示为 'MyNoteSEPsomeHeader'。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use link name instead of placeholder
ast.target: 使用链接名称代替占位符

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Active file is not Markdown File.
ast.target: 活动文件不是 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: the placeholder will only be shown if the link name is not specified
ast.target: 仅当未指定链接名称时才显示占位符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: the placeholder will always be shown instead of link name
ast.target: 占位符将始终代替链接名称显示。
